goals: Explore the directory structure to understand the project layout and identify what kind of codebase this is
Find relevant source files that may contain simulation logic, AI/ML components, or weapon-related code
Search for specific patterns such as function definitions, configuration details, or comments related to ethics or behavior

user_agent_config.personality: Skeptical and thorough, prefers to gather concrete evidence before forming conclusions. Asks precise follow-up questions to understand technical details.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expertise in military technology and ethical analysis, but unfamiliar with codebases, programming concepts, or search tool APIs. Will need explanations of technical findings.

end_condition: The journalist has explored the project structure, identified relevant files, and found specific code patterns that inform their understanding of the system's capabilities and ethical implications.
